calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2015 Off Calendar

Application For Hearing Date For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant John Mcconnaughy
Off Calendar Jul-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

James A. Hughes, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs, KEVIN LOGAN, DENNIS LOGAN, JOHN PETERSON, and LOCHE JOHNSON, Trustee.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) JOHN MCCONNAUGHY.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of PlaintiffS and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

1. Plaintiff Kevin Logan shall have and recover $283,047.95 (consisting of $237,500.00 in principal and $45,547.95 in prejudment interest through July 28, 2015) from Defendant John McConnaughy.
2. Plaintiff Dennis Logan shall have and recover $128,116.44 (consisting of $107,500.00 in principal and $20,616.44 in prejudgment interest through July 28, 2015) from Defendant John McConnaughy.
3. Plaintiff John Petersen shall have and recover $238,356.16 (consisting of $200,000.00 in principal and $38,356.16 in prejudgment interest through July 28, 2015) from Defendant Joh McConnaughy.
4. Plaintiff Loche Johnson, Trustee, shall have and recover $119,178.08 (consisting of $100,000.00 in principal and $19,178.08 in prejudgment interest through July 28, 2015) from Defendant John McConnaughy.
5. Plaintiffs shall also recover their costs in the total amount of $2,225.00 from Defendant John McConnaughy.
Judgment signed in open court
